posts.cooked:
(Latest LBA File Information)

If you have new information for the LBA File Information project, please post it in this thread.

Use LBA Package Editor with file info (not LBADeCOMP), and choose Display all entires and Index all entries. Then start making the list.

Template submission for packages entries listing

FILENAME

%1 001 ~1 Twinsen running *
%2 002 ~1 Twinsen fishing *
%4 003 ~2 Twinsun model *
%1 004 ~1 Zo chatting with Sendell *

-END-

~1 = animation
~2 = model

In the beggining of each line, place %+(number) (one spacing after the number).
%1 stands for normal entry
%2 stands for hidden entry
%3 stands for repeated entry
%4 stands for blank entry

The number of the entry should be 3 digits. Between the number of the entry and the description there should be ~+(number) (one spacing before the ~ and one spacing after the number).
Make one number for each entry type, and then (like in the template) explain which is each.

In the description, make capital letters only in the start of a sentence and in the first letter of a name. Make the descriptions as short as possible.

In the end, place * (one spacing before the *).

Im asking you to use this template just for I wont have to do it myself. (it takes a lot of time)
-----------

If you any have information you can give about LBA files other than packages entries listing, please start a new thread about it in the LBA Modifications forum.
